signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil commissions Discovery 6 supercomputer with HPE and NVIDIA for seismic processing
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil commissioned its Discovery Six supercomputer developed with Hewlett Packard Enterprise and NVIDIA to accelerate seismic processing and exploration. Processing that took months now takes weeks.

signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil partners with Intel and UNICOM Engineering on data center immersion cooling technology
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil expanded its data center strategy through partnerships with Intel and UNICOM Engineering to develop immersion cooling solutions, positioning itself as a full-stack energy partner for AI data centers.

signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil Microsoft partnership for Permian Basin IoT and cloud infrastructure
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil collaborates with Microsoft to use IoT technologies in Permian Basin operations to monitor and optimize field assets. Data collected from extensive sensor network stored in cloud.

signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil partners with CoLab Software for AI engineering tools on offshore rigs
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil invested $5.6 million partnership with CoLab Software to deploy AI engineering tools on offshore rigs, establishing an AI development hub in Newfoundland and Labrador Canada.

signals.signal_title: ExxonMobil advancing low-carbon data center projects targeting FID by late 2026
signals.signal_description: ExxonMobil advancing integrated CCS-enabled low-carbon data center projects targeting a final investment decision by late 2026, positioning company as energy-as-a-service provider for AI hyperscalers.
